CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-20-2004 Text Ruling

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-20-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Daniel J. Kelly, Esq. for Plaintiff: Gravity Technologies, Inc. dba Gravity People.
Plaintiff's witness: Steve Hazelton, was sworn & examined.
Exh. 1 - Referral Agreement dtd. 8-22-02-----------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Placement/Referral card-------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 3 - Invoice #3373-----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 4 - Damages and Interest calculation----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Priceworks Corporation as follows:
Principal/Damages of $25,000.00
Prejudgment interest $5,067.00
Attorney's fees of $2,825.00
Costs of $264.50
For the total of $33,156.50
Counsel stipulated for the return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.
